---
name: Documentation issue
about: Report something unclear, missing, or wrong in the docs
title: "[docs] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Where

Link or path to the affected docs (README, package README, docs site page at
prisma-ltree.procka.org, or a file under `docs/` or `apps/web/content/docs/`).

## What's wrong or missing

Describe the problem — incorrect, outdated, confusing, or absent.

## Suggested improvement

If you have one. PRs welcome — see [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).
